chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 435 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.1823/2022 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 09-09-2025 On 02-09-2025 the following order was passed;- “Mr. Nawab Ali Pitafi, Advocate holding brief on behalf of Mr. Abdul Raheem Mahar, counsel for petitioners requests for adjournment on the ground that latter has proceeded to participate in funeral ceremony of his relative. It reflects that process, of which the petitioners are seeking appointments, was held in the year, 2013 and this petition was filed in the year 2022; hence, laches are involved. Adjourned to 02.09.2025, when counsel for petitioners shall satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition on the above point.” Today, none present for the petitioners nor any intimation received. The instant Constitutional petition is pending without any useful progress. The absence on the part of the petitioners and their Counsel prima facie suggests that either the purpose of filing instant Petition has been served or they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
